(M6G) None of Above Foot Problems CHAR 1 Skin condition: foot problems and care in last 7 days - none of above. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
439 N1A N1A_MORNING (N1A) Morning CHAR 1 Activity pursuit patterns: time awake over last 7 days - morning. This field indicates if the resident is awake all or most of the morning (I.e., naps no more than one hour during the morning). 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown
440 N1B N1B_AFTERNOON (N1B) Afternoon CHAR 1 Activity pursuit patterns: time awake over
